repo_prior_art.cite: closest is pid_network_exposure/v1: shared-completion LP sharpness and compatibility certificates, not a null-vs-alternative testability modulus

published_prior_art.cite: GaoHarshawSavjeWang2026 gives broad exposure-map testing impossibility and a positive linear-in-means case, but not a sparse-K collision modulus
GaoHarshawSavjeWang2026 includes a different no-interference versus network-linear-in-means positive case

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1: finite sharp LP regions under hidden graph completions

published_prior_art.cite: BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2011 random-set sharp regions; SchroderOprescuFeuerriegelKallus2026 sharp bounds for misspecified exposure mappings

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The testing prior art omits HoshinoYanagi2023, 'Randomization Test for the Specification of Interference Structure,' a directly relevant exposure-mapping specification-test comparator.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The GaoHarshawSavjeWang2026 positive special-case comparator is cited without a section/theorem/equation anchor tying it to the claimed sparse threshold-map escape.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The positive-branch sketch says the LP-dual witness attaining the minimum Lambda_K gives the finite test, but a closest-pair dual certificate need not separate the null from every alternative in the finite union; the route needs a finite family of separators or a distance-to-null statistic.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup
soundness_flags.one_line: Label normalization uses conditional mean vectors, so B(G,e) and M(G,e) are not fixed linear maps unless the proposal freezes labels ex ante or explicitly enumerates the induced label permutations.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add HoshinoYanagi2023, BasseFellerToulis2019, and PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022 to Related work, then explain why those randomization/specification tests do not supply the sparse-K TV collision frontier.

Replace the single closest-pair LP-dual proof sketch with a finite-union separation construction, e.g. pairwise LP certificates plus Bonferroni/min-distance testing, or an empirical distance-to-null-class statistic.
Make label normalization algebraically fixed by either declaring labels part of the exposure-system primitive or expanding each fiber over all admissible label permutations before defining Lambda_K.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature anchor and the finite-separation construction; the novelty kernel can still clear the flagship floor if those patches are made.
